name: ClawPilot Composio Plugin for OpenClaw
description: Access third-party tools via a ClawPilot-managed Composio user binding

enabled.description: Enable or disable the Composio plugin

apiKey.description: Composio API key (or set COMPOSIO_API_KEY env var)

userId.description: ClawPilot-managed Composio user ID (or set COMPOSIO_USER_ID env var)

enabled.label: Enable Composio
enabled.help: Enable or disable the ClawPilot Composio integration
